description_long: This temple is a compact, square-based structure with a two-tiered, ornate roof featuring upturned eaves and decorative ridge elements, characteristic of East Asian architecture. The building is surrounded by a low, rectangular stone or concrete wall with decorative posts and railings, enclosing a paved courtyard. The main entrance is a large, arched gateway with a prominent, intricately framed opening, flanked by smaller decorative columns and topped with detailed roof ornamentation. The walls are adorned with subtle reliefs and framed panels, and the roof tiles are a warm, golden-orange color, contrasting with the muted stone base. The upper tier of the temple is smaller, with its own set of eaves and decorative finials, giving the structure a tiered, pagoda-like appearance. The overall impression is one of symmetry, balance, and careful craftsmanship, with a focus on both structural solidity and decorative detail.
description: A compact, two-tiered East Asian temple with ornate upturned eaves, golden-orange tiled roofs, and a large arched entrance, surrounded by a low decorative wall and paved courtyard.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main arched entrance, the layered roof structure, and the decorative wall enclosing the courtyard.
description_view_1: From this angle, the symmetry of the temple and the depth of the entrance archway are prominent, with more of the side wall details visible.
description_view_2: This perspective shows the rear and side of the temple, emphasizing the tiered roof and the continuity of the surrounding wall.
description_view_3: This view provides a clear look at the side elevation, showcasing the ornate roof eaves and the paved area around the temple.
attribute_ornamentation: moderate density of decorative ridge tiles, upturned eaves, framed wall panels, and subtle reliefs with geometric and floral motifs
attribute_entrance_design: large arched gateway with a prominent, intricately framed opening, flanked by decorative columns and topped with ornate roof elements
